messages.body:
Subject: Availability – lecithin fat powder

Hi,

Could you please quote availability and price for lecithin fat powder? We need two batches: 10 MT by November this year and the remainder in January next year.

Thanks.

Subject: Re: Availability – lecithin fat powder

Hi,

We can support that schedule. Checking stock and will revert with a formal quote shortly.

Subject: Re: Availability – lecithin fat powder

We can offer USD 12.50 per kg for the total quantity, split across the two shipment dates as you specified.

Subject: Re: Availability – lecithin fat powder

That is higher than our budget. Can you do USD 11/kg?

Subject: Re: Availability – lecithin fat powder

We need to check internally. Will revert within 24 hours.

Subject: Re: Availability – lecithin fat powder

Our best offer is USD 12/kg. This offer expires by mid-day tomorrow.

Subject: Re: Availability – lecithin fat powder

OK, we confirm. Total 20 MT. Please confirm split: 8 MT in april and the remaining 12 MT in may.

Subject: Re: Availability – lecithin fat powder

Confirmed. 20 MT lecithin fat powder at USD 12/kg: 8 MT april shipment, 12 MT may shipment. We are generating the contract and will send it shortly.

Best regards.

Subject: Re: Availability – lecithin fat powder

Thanks.
